sections.headline: From farm. To shelf. Without losing a day of freshness.
sections.subheadline:
India's F&V supply chain loses value at every uncontrolled step.
Crystal's processing infrastructure: pre-cooling, sorting, grading, packing, and cold storage, designed to compress that loss and extend shelf life from the point of harvest.

sections.headline: Ready to compress your supply chain loss?
sections.body: From harvest to retail, Crystal provides the climate-controlled backbone for your fruit and vegetable operations.

items.title: Pre-cooling
items.description: Rapid field heat removal immediately post-harvest. The single most important step in extending F&V shelf life, and the most commonly skipped.

items.title: Sorting & grading
items.description: Size, weight, and quality grading to retail or export specifications. Reduces waste, improves presentation, and commands better pricing.

items.title: Packing & palletisation
items.description: Export-ready or retail-ready packing in compliant packaging. Palletised for efficient cold storage and transport.

items.title: Cold storage
items.description: Post-processing cold storage at the right temperature for each product. Integrated with Crystal's warehousing and transport network.

cta.label: Talk to us about F&V processing
